response.overview: Prakash, a rich orphan, has been brought up by his family servant Gopal kaka. Prakash falls in love with Archana and they get married. They are living a happy life until one day Archana dies after giving birth to their son Rajesh. Prakash holds Rajesh responsible for Archana's death and does not want to see him at all, so he keeps him away with his brother in law
response.title: Archana
